items.name: caveman
items.hook: Why use many token when few token do trick. Meme skill that makes Claude talk caveman cuts ~65% of tokens on real tasks — hit ~39.8k stars in 16 days and became the April story.

items.name: career-ops
items.hook: AI-powered job-search stack built on Claude Code — 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, resume+cover-letter batch generation. ~36.7k stars from an April 4 creation.

items.name: graphify
items.hook: Turn any folder of code, docs, papers, images, or video into a queryable knowledge graph. Works across Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI. ~31k stars in <3 weeks.

items.name: Claude Opus 4.7
items.hook: GA on April 16. xhigh effort level, task budgets with countdown, /ultrareview multi-agent code review, 2576px vision, 87.6% SWE-bench Verified, Auto mode for Max. Same $5/$25 pricing as 4.6.

items.name: Claude Code Routines
items.hook: April 14 launch: scheduled Claude Code runs on Anthropic's cloud. Cron-like cadence, API webhook, or GitHub-event triggers — no laptop online. Pro 5/day, Max 15, Team 25.
items.install: enable in Claude Code web → Routines

items.name: awesome-persona-distill-skills
items.hook: Curated catalog of persona-distillation Agent Skills — people, relationships, commemorative personas, methodological voices. Biggest April marketplace list, ~3.9k stars.

items.name: fireworks-tech-graph
items.hook: Claude Code skill for production-quality SVG+PNG technical diagrams — 8 diagram types, 5 visual styles, deep AI/agent domain knowledge. ~3.85k stars.

items.name: codeburn
items.hook: Interactive TUI dashboard showing where your AI coding tokens go across Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. April cost-observability breakout — ~2.95k stars from an April 13 launch.

items.name: OpenMythos
items.hook: Theoretical reconstruction of the Claude Mythos architecture from first principles + published research literature. ~2.86k stars in days after its April 18 drop.

items.name: claude-obsidian
items.hook: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Persistent compounding wiki vault built on Karpathy's LLM-Wiki pattern. /wiki /save /autoresearch. ~2.2k stars.

items.name: darwin-skill
items.hook: Autoresearch-inspired skill that evaluates, improves, tests, then keeps or reverts your other skills. ~1.36k stars in a week.

items.name: Claude-Code-Source-Study
items.hook: Chinese deep-dive into the Claude Code source, studying the current best-in-class agent implementation. Post-leak reading club, ~1.2k stars.

items.name: design-extract
items.hook: One command extracts any website's complete design system — DTCG tokens, Tailwind v4, shadcn/ui, iOS/Android/Flutter emitters. MCP server for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf. ~1.1k stars.

items.name: claude-usage
items.hook: Local dashboard for Claude Code token usage, costs, and session history. Pro/Max subscribers see a progress bar. ~1.09k stars.

items.name: paper2code
items.hook: Agent skill that turns any arxiv paper into a working implementation. ~955 stars and a steady favorite of the autoresearch crowd.

items.name: codesight
items.hook: Universal AI context generator — saves thousands of tokens per conversation in Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex. ~940 stars.

items.name: anthropics/claude-desktop-buddy
items.hook: Reference implementation of the Bluetooth API for makers in Claude Cowork & Claude Code Desktop. First-party signal that Code Desktop is now an integration surface. ~871 stars.

items.name: claude-memory-compiler
items.hook: Hooks capture sessions, the Agent SDK extracts decisions and lessons, an LLM compiler organizes them into cross-referenced knowledge articles. Karpathy-KB flavored. ~827 stars.

items.name: diagram-design
items.hook: Thirteen editorial diagram types for Claude Code — self-contained HTML + SVG, no shadows, no Mermaid-slop. ~813 stars in four days.

items.name: material-3-skill
items.hook: Material Design 3 skill for Claude Code — 30+ components, design tokens, theming, responsive layout, MD3 compliance audit. ~732 stars.

items.name: gopher-code
items.hook: Claude Code rewritten from scratch in Go — zero Node.js, zero Electron, one binary. Post-leak ecosystem arrives at static binaries. ~599 stars.

items.name: antivibe
items.hook: Counter-skill for vibe-coding — turns AI-generated code into educational deep dives so you actually learn what was written. ~591 stars.

items.name: llmwiki
items.hook: Open-source implementation of Karpathy's LLM Wiki — upload docs, connect Claude over MCP, have it write your wiki. ~563 stars, cleanest of the wiki cluster.

items.name: awesome-claude-design
items.hook: 68 ready-to-use design system inspirations packaged as DESIGN.md drop-ins. Scaffold a full UI in one shot. ~558 stars within two days of launch.

items.name: evo (evo-hq)
items.hook: Plugin that turns your codebase into an autoresearch loop — discovers what to measure, instruments the benchmark, runs tree search with parallel subagents. ~486 stars.
